20.reason: [The program tries to open files "filein.txt" and "fileout.txt", but the problem expects input from stdin and output to stdout. This causes incorrect I/O behavior and may lead to runtime errors or no output if files don't exist.]

66.reason: [This line sets flag[i] = 1, but the function is called recursively and may overwrite flags inconsistently. Also, in cnt_right, same issue. More critically, global 'flag' array is uninitialized, leading to undefined behavior when checking 'if (flag[i] == 0)' in main.]
